include.description: Allowlist rules. When any include rule matches a provider, only matching models from that provider remain visible.

exclude.description: Blocklist rules. Exclude rules are applied after include rules, so exclude always wins.

provider.description: Provider id or glob pattern, for example openrouter or *

items.description: Model id or glob pattern, for example gpt-* or qwen/*

models.description: Exact model ids or glob patterns for the matched provider(s)
